---

# Home

## The right building changes everything. Let's find yours.

Nicole James · Downtown Austin · Since 2007

Your insider to downtown Austin's most sought-after residences.

## Building-level knowledge. Personal accountability.

A nineteen-year specialty practice in downtown Austin condominium towers.

Nicole James began her real estate career in Austin in 2007. She was nominated for the Austin Business Journal's Top 50 Residential Real Estate Agents in 2011, 2012, and 2014. Over the next decade her practice consolidated around downtown Austin condominium living, and the results showed up inside specific buildings.

More than 90 units sold at Bridges on The Park alone, with the highest sales prices repeatedly over the last ten years and among the shortest days on market in the building. Christie's International Real Estate recognized her as a Luxury Specialist in 2020. A growing share of her transactions close privately, before hitting the public market.

## Services and expertise: I know the buildings.

- Seller representation — for owners selling a downtown Austin condo.
- Buyer representation — for clients buying into downtown Austin condo towers.
- Off-market advisory — quiet conversations before anything goes public.

## Credentials

- License: Licensed Real Estate Agent · Texas TREC #549414
- Designation: Christie's International Real Estate Luxury Specialist · Since 2020
- Brokerage: @properties Lone Star · Christie's International Real Estate
- Memberships: Austin Board of REALTORS · Texas REALTORS · NAR · Downtown Austin Neighborhood Association

# About

Source: https://nicolejamesaustin.com/about.html

## Global reach. Local hand.

@properties Lone Star Christie's International Real Estate × Nicole James

- Global network: ~50 countries
- Luxury Specialist designation: Christie's, 2020
- Cross-listing: christiesrealestate.com

## A nineteen-year specialty practice.

Key figures:
- 90+ units sold at Bridges on The Park
- 19 years in the downtown Austin market
- 3× Austin Business Journal Top 50 nominee (2011, 2012, 2014)
- 20+ downtown towers covered

## The hand behind the practice.

Nicole James has spent nineteen years building a practice that goes deeper than most agents go wide. Her focus is downtown Austin condominium towers: the buildings, their HOAs, their floor lines, their pricing cycles, and the people who live in them. Christie's International Real Estate certified her as a Luxury Specialist in 2020. A growing portion of her work happens off-market, before anything reaches a public listing.

---

# Services

Source: https://nicolejamesaustin.com/services.html

## Countless buildings. One specialty.

A constantly growing supply of condominium towers across downtown Austin. One agent who has worked them all — floor by floor, HOA by HOA, cycle by cycle.

### Buildings covered

Bridges on The Park (South Lamar) · The Independent (2nd & West) · The Austonian (Congress) · 70 Rainey (Rainey) · Four Seasons Residences (Town Lake) · Fifth & West Residences (5th Street) · Seaholm Residences (2nd Street) · The Catherine (Rainey) · 360 Condos (3rd & Nueces) · Spring (3rd & Bowie) · Milago (Rainey) · Skyhouse Austin (Rainey) · The Shore (Rainey) · 44 East Avenue (Rainey) · Natiivo (Rainey) · Vesper ATX (Rainey) · Austin City Lofts (2nd Street) · The Nokonah (Market District) · 5 Fifty Five (5th Street) · Tyndall (8th Street) · Austin Proper Residences (2nd Street) · Cambridge Tower (Capitol) · Luminary (Capitol) · Sixth & Brushy (Market District) · Brazos Place (Market District) · Sabine on 5th (Sabine) · Penthouse Condominiums (Convention) · The Monarch (Capitol) · The Ashton (Lavaca) · 908 Nueces (Capitol) · The Modern Austin (5th & Red River) · The Denizen (Convention) · 904 West (Market District) · Brazos Lofts (Brazos)

## For sellers

- High-quality staging and photography: every listing prepared and shot to hold its own against new construction.
- Christie's international buyer network: placement within Christie's International Real Estate surfaces qualified buyers beyond local MLS exposure.

## Off-market advisory

Discreet seller consultations and pre-market buyer matching — before anything reaches the public market.

- Discreet seller consults
- Pre-market matching
- No signage, no public exposure until the moment is right

## For buyers

Building-level knowledge, the off-market network, and Christie's global reach combined into representation on the buyer side. Floor-by-floor analysis, HOA review, and negotiation grounded in the building's actual sold comparables.

Source: https://nicolejamesaustin.com/contact.html

## A direct line, read by Nicole.

Buyer representation, seller consultations, off-market conversations. Messages go to Nicole directly, not an assistant. Responses within one business day.
